name: Clearbit

auth.notes: Legacy/current customer docs refer to a secret Clearbit API key; clearbit.com/docs redirects to dashboard login, so endpoint-level current auth details require authenticated verification.

rateLimits: Needs review. Public help docs explain request accounting and Reveal MUV accounting; historical SDK/community docs mention 600 requests/min, but current endpoint-level public docs are login-gated.
pagination: Needs review. Enrichment and Reveal are lookup-style; legacy Prospector/Discovery SDK examples use page/page_size, but current availability and pagination require authenticated docs.
notes: Keep needs-review: Clearbit public Help Center API articles are legacy/customer-plan specific, while clearbit.com/docs redirects to the dashboard login.
Official clearbit-node SDK exists but is deprecated and points users to HTTP documentation.
Clearbit by HubSpot/Breeze changes make new-customer API availability unclear from public docs.
reviewReason: Exact blocker: current endpoint-level API documentation at clearbit.com/docs is behind dashboard login, while public Help Center articles are legacy/customer-plan specific. Need authenticated confirmation of current Enrichment/Reveal availability, auth, rate limits, pagination, and OpenAPI/spec status.
